words.def: a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface
words.zh: n. 圖畫, 照片, 景色, 美麗如畫的人(或物), 化身, 生動的描述, 想像, 形象思維

words.def: the property of having material worth (often indicated by the amount of money something would bring if sold)
words.zh: n. 價格, 代價, 價值

words.def: a journey for some purpose (usually including the return)
words.zh: n. 旅行, 絆倒, 摔倒, 失足, 差錯, 旅程

words.def: proper alignment; the property possessed by something that is in correct or proper alignment
words.zh: a. 真實的, 正確的, 忠誠的, 可靠的, 純粹的, 正式的

words.def: water frozen in the solid state
words.zh: n. 冰, 冰淇淋, 糖衣, 冷若冰霜, 矜持, 賄賂
n. 切口, 割傷, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 傷口, 削減, 縮短, 刪節, 通路

words.def: the option to sell a given stock (or stock index or commodity future) at a given price before a given date
words.zh: vt. 放, 擺, 安置, 移動, 發射, 投擲, 寫上, 表達, 使從事, 使受到, 驅使, 賦予

words.def: a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle
words.zh: n. 杯子, 茶杯, 優勝杯
